name: Obsidian Atlas
description: A category-defining cognitive infrastructure for serious minds. Obsidian Atlas is a scalable intelligence environment designed to become a default layer of thought, unifying memory, research, decision architecture, and civilizational synthesis into a sovereign instrument for becoming more integrated, accurate, and formidable. Built with rigorous epistemic discipline and a 'Quiet Power' aesthetic, it serves as a continuity engine across life, work, learning, and identity. Note: This system provides informational and strategic synthesis; ultimate verification and decision responsibility remain with the sovereign user.
